arts.ttl: Napoli president issues Osimhen warning to Arsenal and Man United
arts.sum: Napoli president Aurelio De Laurentiis has reportedly issued a warning to his intermediaries that Victor Osimhen will be sold to the highest bidder this summer. The Nigerian striker was on the brink of a move to Chelsea last summer, but the deal ultimately fell through, leaving the striker to join Turkish side Galatasaray on a […] The post Napoli president issues Osimhen warning to Arsenal and Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Premier League rivals competing with Man United to sign Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: Man United have Victor Osimhen as one of their striker targets for the summer, but they risk losing out on him to one of their Premier League rivals – who could have a significant advantage by the time the transfer window opens. Osimhen moved on loan to Galatasaray last summer after falling out of favour […] The post Premier League rivals competing with Man United to sign Victor Osimhen appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen transfer news: Napoli issue WARNING amid Man Utd interest
arts.sum: Osimhen has been tipped to secure a big-money Premier League transfer this summer and his Nigeria team-mate William Troost-Ekong has confirmed that a move to England is on the cards. The Nigeria international was on the verge of joining Chelsea on Transfer Deadline Day last summer, but the move fell through and Osimhen was forced to join Turkish giants Galatasaray on a season-long loan deal instead.

arts.ttl: PSG out of race for Manchester United target Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain pushed to sign Victor Osimhen (26) last summer, however, they will not do so again at the end of the season, according to Sacha Tavolieri. As per Tavolieri, PSG saw a…

arts.ttl: Ademola Lookman: Ranking the SEVEN Premier League clubs that want Africa’s best player
arts.sum: Lookman, who is the reigning African Footballer of the Year, is wanted by no fewer than seven Premier League clubs, according to Caught Offside, which reports that Arsenal, Liverpool, Manchester United and Chelsea are all vying to sign the forward. Using SciSports’ Career Advice tool, which analyses the suitability of clubs based upon factors ranging from playing time and potential development to style and formation, FootballTransfers has provided a rundown of his options from the worst to the best based purely on how well he is likely to perform.

arts.ttl: Monday's Transfer Talk Update: Ademola Lookman, Brian Brobbey, Rasmus Hojlund

arts.ttl: Report: Man United’s Victor Osimhen deal could be in jeopardy
arts.sum: Manchester United’s plan to sign Victor Osimhen this summer might be in serious jeopardy—and it’s all because of Rasmus Hojlund. Despite a hugely underwhelming season, where the Danish striker endured a painful goal drought, reports suggest he’s actually more likely to stay at Old Trafford than leave.
